title: PPU UG Admission 2026-30

detail.title: PPU UG Admission 2026-30
detail.short_info: PPU UG Admission 2026-30 is open. Apply online for 4 Year BA, BSc, BCom courses at Patliputra University Patna from 20 May to 31 May 2026. Check eligibility, application fee and how to apply.

content.text: Patliputra University (PPU), Patna has started the online application process for 4-Year Undergraduate (UG) Degree Programmes (B.A., B.Sc., B.Com.) under CBCS for the academic session 2026-30. Interested candidates can apply online through the PPU Samarth Portal from 20 May 2026 to 31 May 2026. This is a great opportunity for students seeking admission in Arts, Science, and Commerce streams in Patliputra University and its affiliated colleges.

rows: 4-Year UG Programmes (B.A., B.Sc., B.Com.) under CBCS
Passed Intermediate (I.A. / I.Sc. / I.Com. / +2) from Bihar School Examination Board or equivalent recognised board.
Passed Intermediate (I.A. / I.Sc. / I.Com. / +2) from Bihar School Examination Board or equivalent recognised board.
Passed Intermediate (I.Sc. / +2 Science Stream only) from Bihar School Examination Board or equivalent recognised board.

content.text: Payment Mode: Online through Credit Card, Debit Card, or Net Banking.

sections.heading: How to Apply for PPU UG Admission 2026-30

items: Click on the link “Apply for UG-CBCS Admission for Session: 2026-2030 on Samarth Portal”.
Register with your Name, Date of Birth, Email, Mobile Number, and Password.
Fill the detailed application form and upload required documents.
Preview the form, pay the application fee online.
Submit and download the confirmation page for future reference.

sections.heading: Documents Required for PPU UG Admission 2026-30
